{"code":"(def prs (github_pull_requests))
(def linear (linear_issues))

; Get all merged PRs and their closes_linear values
(def merged-prs (filter #(= "merged" (:state %)) prs))
(def merged-closes (map :closes_linear merged-prs))

; Identify Linear issues with state 'done' that claim to close something
(def done-issues (filter #(= "done" (:state %)) linear))
